summary: Tested supplier balance bug fix (delete expense reduces credit) and Table Reservations system. Fixed ReservationUpdate model bug causing 500 error on PUT. All 20 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified working with all features.

reservation_update_500_error.issue: PUT /api/reservations/{id} returned 500 Internal Server Error - ReservationUpdate model missing table_id field
reservation_update_500_error.fix: Added table_id: Optional[str] = None to ReservationUpdate model (line 612)
reservation_update_500_error.root_cause: Code at line 741 accessed data.table_id but the field was not defined in the Pydantic model

seed_data_creation: Existing test reservation: Ahmed Al-Rashid (RES2603024B3E) for 19:00, 4 guests, Birthday occasion at Table T1. Test data prefixed with TEST_iter65 was created and cleaned up during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Supplier balance bug fix verified - deleting credit expense now correctly reduces supplier's current_credit. Reservations feature fully working with endpoints: GET/POST/PUT/DELETE /api/reservations, GET /api/reservations/today, GET /api/reservations/upcoming, GET /api/reservations/stats, GET /api/reservations/available-slots, POST /api/reservations/{id}/status. UI at /reservations with Today, Upcoming, Calendar tabs. 20 tables available (T1-T8, V1-V3, O1-O4, B1-B3, P1-P2).

supplier_balance_recalculation.details: Both endpoints work correctly to recalculate supplier credit based on expenses and payments

expense_delete_credit_reduction.details: BUG FIX VERIFIED - Deleting credit expense now correctly reduces supplier's current_credit balance

reservations_crud.details: Full CRUD operations working. Fixed PUT endpoint 500 error by adding table_id to ReservationUpdate model

reservations_stats.details: Returns today stats (total, confirmed, seated, completed, cancelled, no_show), weekly stats, and popular_times

reservations_available_slots.details: Returns available time slots with matching tables

reservations_status_lifecycle.details: Full lifecycle working: confirmed -> seated -> completed, cancel, no_show transitions

reservations_validation.details: Validates party_size vs table capacity (400), conflicting slots (400), invalid table (404), invalid status (400)

reservations_page_ui.details: Page loads with stats cards, Today/Upcoming/Calendar tabs, New Reservation dialog with all fields, reservation detail dialog with Seat/No Show/Cancel/Delete actions
